observation.command:
cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/functional-0/004_const_var_defn.sysu.c/answer.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
# Find non-implicit nodes
def find_interesting(node, depth=0):
    if not node.get('isImplicit', False) and node.get('kind') != 'TypedefDecl' and node.get('kind') != 'BuiltinType':
        kind = node.get('kind','')
        name = node.get('name','')
        val = node.get('value','')
        typ = node.get('type',{}).get('qualType','')
        print(f'{'  '*depth}{kind} name={name} value={val} type={typ}')
    for child in node.get('inner', []):
        find_interesting(child, depth+1)
find_interesting(data)
" 2>/dev/null
